calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Jun-23-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for order vacating dismissal and entering judgment against defendant pursuant to CCP 664.6" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2021 Continued To Apr-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
